caption: Remediation Activity
description: Remediation Activity events report on attempts at remediating a compromised device or computer network.
name: remediation_activity

references.description: Countermeasures defined by the D3FEND™ Matrix

activity_id.description: Matches the countermeasure tactic. Note: the Model tactic is not supported by the OCSF Remediation event class.

1.caption: Isolate
1.description: Creates logical or physical barriers in a system which reduces opportunities for adversaries to create further accesses.

2.caption: Evict
2.description: Removes an adversary or malicious resource from a device or computer network.

3.caption: Restore
3.description: Returns the system to a better state.

4.caption: Harden
4.description: Increases the opportunity cost of computer network exploitation.

5.caption: Detect
5.description: Identify adversary access to or unauthorized activity on computer networks.

6.caption: Deceive
6.description: Advertise, entice, and allow potential attackers access to an observed or controlled environment.

command_uid.description: The unique identifier of the remediation command that pertains to this event.

scan.description: The remediation scan that pertains to this event.

3.caption: Does Not Exist
3.description: The target of the remediation does not exist.

6.caption: Error
6.description: There was an error during the remediation process.
